name: Snowflake Inc.
summary: Snowflake Inc. delivers the AI Data Cloud, a cloud-based platform enabling organizations to consolidate data into a single source of truth, apply AI to solve business problems, build data applications, and share data securely. Its platform features independently scalable storage, compute, and cloud services layers, supporting structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data. Snowflake operates on a consumption-based business model and runs on public cloud infrastructure, requiring near-zero infrastructure maintenance for customers.

products.name: AI Data Cloud
products.description: A network enabling customers, partners, developers, data providers, and consumers to break down data silos, share data, and derive value from data sets in secure, governed, compliant ways.

products.name: Snowflake Platform
products.description: Cloud-native data platform with independently scalable storage, compute, and cloud services layers supporting diverse data workloads and AI applications.

partnerships.description: The filing references partner relationships as key to growth but does not name specific partners in the extracted section.
